title: RTP Plugin smp
description: A fast and reliable RTP plugin for Minecraft Paper servers that lets players safely teleport to random locations. Perfect for Donut SMP-style gameplay, it encourages exploration, reduces spawn crowding, and delivers smooth, customizable performance.
body:
RTP Plugin – Fast, Fair & SMP-Ready Teleportation

Take your Minecraft server to the next level with a smooth and reliable Random Teleport (RTP) system—perfect for Donut SMP-style gameplay on Paper servers.

This plugin lets players instantly teleport to random, safe locations across your world, encouraging exploration, base building, and survival progression without limits.

✨ Features

⚡ Instant random teleportation
🛡️ Safe location detection (no lava, void, or unsafe spawns)
🌍 Supports multiple worlds
🎯 Custom radius & teleport settings
⏱️ Cooldowns & permissions support
🧭 Perfect for Donut SMP-style servers

🔥 Why use this plugin?
Inspired by popular survival servers like Donut SMP, this RTP system keeps gameplay fresh and unpredictable. Players can escape spawn, avoid overcrowding, and start their journey anywhere in the world.

⚙️ Built for Performance
Optimized for Paper, ensuring minimal lag and maximum efficiency—even on large servers.

🚀 Use Cases

Survival SMP servers
Anarchy-style gameplay
Exploration-focused worlds
Fresh start mechanics

Give your players the freedom to explore without boundaries.
